title: Create: Unlimited Logistics
description: Adds dedicated item vault support to Create's logistics
body:
# About
Create: Unlimited Logistics allows factory gauges to fill requests up to 100 vaults worth of items instead of only 100 stacks (6.17% of a max vanilla item vault)  More features to come!

# Dependencies
Only the base [Create Mod](https://modrinth.com/mod/create) is required to install this mod
(Supports Create 6.0.6)

# Features
- A new row on factory gauges allows calculations in item vaults (20 stacks) instead of stacks or items
- Factory gauge creafting recipe slots can hold up to 423 items (see config) instead of only 64
